commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=5e0fb8962ad387bb6f1d1a3d14deadeec495c450)
commands.review_summary:
The PR replaces three Feishu bitable record-valued tool parameters with a shared non-empty TypeBox union and adds schema regression tests for the empty `patternProperties` case.

PR surface: Source +17, Tests +52. Total +69 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. Current main and v2026.6.8 expose the three `Type.Record(Type.String(), Type.Any())` schemas, and the PR proof shows the after-fix schema emission path; the review also source-reproduced the new array-of-object regression from the PR schema and Feishu SDK types.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] A narrow automated repair can expand the value schema and tests without a product or ownership decision.

target.title: fix(feishu): replace empty bitable record value schema rejected by strict validators
target.body:
## Summary
- The bitable write tools (`feishu_bitable_create_record`, `feishu_bitable_update_record`, `feishu_bitable_create_field`) declared their free-form record-typed parameters as `Type.Record(Type.String(), Type.Any())`. `Type.Any()` serializes to the empty schema `{}`, so each tool's parameter schema contained `patternProperties: { "^.*$": {} }` with an **empty value sub-schema**.
- AWS Bedrock enforces strict JSON Schema draft 2020-12 and rejects empty sub-schemas, which fails the **entire** tool list (not just bitable) for any agent routing Anthropic through Bedrock. The Anthropic direct API tolerates the empty sub-schema, so this only manifests under strict validators like Bedrock.
- Modeled the field value as a non-empty union of the types a bitable field value can take (string, number, boolean, null, array of primitives, open object). Every branch serializes to a non-empty schema, so `patternProperties` values are no longer empty `{}`. The open-object branch (`Type.Object({}, { additionalProperties: true })`) mirrors the existing pattern already used by other Anthropic-facing tools (e.g. `extensions/browser/src/browser-tool.schema.ts`).
- Note: `Type.Unknown()` was not used because it also serializes to `{}` (same empty schema), so it would not fix the issue.

## Change Type
- [x] Bug fix

## Scope
- [x] Integrations (Feishu plugin)

## Root Cause
- Root cause: `Type.Any()` (and `Type.Unknown()`) serializes to `{}`, an empty JSON Schema with no `type`. Used as the value of `Type.Record(Type.String(), ...)`, it produces `patternProperties: { "^.*$": {} }`. Strict draft 2020-12 validators (Bedrock) reject empty sub-schemas and fail the whole request.
- Missing detection/guardrail: OpenClaw's per-provider tool-schema normalization scrubs unsupported keywords for Gemini/xAI but has no empty-sub-schema sanitization for Anthropic-bound schemas; the Anthropic direct API's tolerance masked the issue until routing through a strict validator.

## Real behavior proof

**Behavior addressed:** The three bitable write tools no longer emit an empty `{}` sub-schema as the value of their `patternProperties` record parameters; the value is now a non-empty `anyOf` union.

**Environment tested:** Node 24.13.1 on Linux, vitest 4.1.8, serializing the actual registered tool parameter schemas from source via `node --import tsx`.

**Steps run after the patch:** Registered the bitable tools through the production `registerFeishuBitableTools` entry point and serialized each tool's `parameters` schema, checking for the regression marker `patternProperties":{"^.*$":{}}` (empty value sub-schema):

```bash
node --import tsx --no-warnings -e "
import { registerFeishuBitableTools } from './extensions/feishu/src/bitable.ts';
const registered = [];
const api = { config: { channels: { feishu: { enabled: true, accounts: { default: { appId: 'x', appSecret: 's' } } } } }, logger: { info(){}, warn(){}, error(){}, debug(){} }, registerTool: (fn, opts) => registered.push({ tool: fn, opts }) };
registerFeishuBitableTools(api);
for (const name of ['feishu_bitable_create_record','feishu_bitable_update_record','feishu_bitable_create_field']) {
  const e = registered.find(r => r.opts?.name === name);
  const params = e.tool({}).parameters;
  console.log(name, '-> empty {} sub-schema:', JSON.stringify(params).includes('\"patternProperties\":{\"^.*$\":{}}'));
}
"
```

**Evidence after fix:**

```text
feishu_bitable_create_record -> empty {} sub-schema: false
feishu_bitable_update_record -> empty {} sub-schema: false
feishu_bitable_create_field -> empty {} sub-schema: false
```

The `patternProperties` value for each tool's record parameter now serializes to a non-empty `anyOf` union, e.g. for `feishu_bitable_create_record`:

```text
"fields": {
  "type": "object",
  "patternProperties": {
    "^.*$": {
      "anyOf": [
        { "type": "string" },
        { "type": "number" },
        { "type": "boolean" },
        { "type": "null" },
        { "type": "array", "items": { "anyOf": [ ... ] } },
        { "type": "object", "properties": {}, "additionalProperties": true }
      ]
    }
  }
}
```

(Before the patch this was `patternProperties: { "^.*$": {} }`.)

**Observed result after the fix:** No bitable write tool emits an empty `{}` value sub-schema; unit tests pass: `vitest run extensions/feishu/src/bitable.test.ts` → 5 passed.

**Not tested:** A live request through an actual AWS Bedrock Anthropic endpoint was not exercised (requires a Bedrock-proxied Anthropic provider); the fix is verified by schema serialization against the strict-validator rejection criterion (empty sub-schema) reported in the issue. Other plugins were not audited for the same `Type.Record(Type.String(), Type.Any())` pattern beyond feishu (a repo-wide grep found no other occurrences).

## Regression Test Plan
- `extensions/feishu/src/bitable.test.ts` — new `describe("feishu bitable write tool schemas")` with three cases (create_record, update_record, create_field), each asserting the `patternProperties` value sub-schema is non-empty and matches `{ anyOf: [...] }`, and that the serialized schema contains no `patternProperties":{"^.*$":{}}` regression marker.

## User-visible / Behavior Changes
Agents routing Anthropic through AWS Bedrock (or other strict draft 2020-12 validators) with feishu bitable write tools enabled no longer have every LLM call rejected with `tools.N.custom.input_schema: JSON schema is invalid`. The bitable field-value schema is now a typed union rather than the unconstrained `Type.Any()`.

## Security Impact
- New permissions? No
- Secrets handling changed? No
- New network calls? No

Closes #94547
target.author: zoowh
